candidate_llm_application: Cascaded-shaft long-context retrieval gallery (CSLRG): periodic auxiliary classifier shafts every 512 tokens infiltrate selected hidden-state summaries into a sparse global gallery cache; final decoding attends over the gallery cache.

results.title: IC-Cache (2025/1)
results.judge_justification: Same artefact (KV cache hierarchy) but caching at request granularity, not periodic mid-stream shafts during single context.

results.title: Continuous Semantic Caching (2026/4)
results.judge_justification: Same artefact (cache for low-cost serving); continuous eviction is functionally equivalent to periodic-shaft selection as gallery-write policy.

results.title: Prefix→Fusion RAG Cache (2026/1)
results.judge_justification: Explicit cache cascade hierarchy from prefix to fusion RAG layer — operationally captures the cascaded-shaft gallery idea minus the periodic-shaft framing.

results.title: Cache-to-Cache (2025/10)
results.judge_justification: Inter-model semantic projection, not intra-context shaft cascade.

results.title: ContextCache (2025/6)
results.judge_justification: Multi-turn semantic cache; close but turn-boundary rather than shaft-period.
